summary: The source contract limits the complete workload domain to at most twelve jobs and twelve workers, while symmetry-pruned branch-and-bound has input-dependent non-monotone search work; those bounds cannot support an honest exponential runtime-scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: jobs contains from 1 through 12 durations and k is from 1 through n

replacement_checks.evidence: At each of at most n recursion levels the current job is assigned to one of k workers; pruning removes repeated equal-load and empty-worker states without excluding a distinct workload multiset, so the complete labeled search is bounded by k^n assignments.

Regression compares the reference with exhaustive labeled worker assignments on 1,008 canonical instances through six jobs, and authored boundary fixtures cover one worker, k equal to n, exact balancing, duplicate durations, twelve jobs, and the maximum duration.
